taxonomy: Centaurea dumanii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This classification places it within the genus Centaurea, which comprises thistle-like plants native to various parts of the world. The plant's classification is often used in botanical studies to understand its evolutionary relationships and ecological roles.
